case_title: SURESH PATEL DBA UNION HOTEL et al VS. MACARTHUR MCALLISTER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SURESH PATEL DBA UNION HOTEL K. MIRANDA, PROP. MGR. AS TO DEFENDANT MCALLISTER, MACARTHUR

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $30 AND NON AVAILABILITY OF WRITTEN AGREEMENT. PREMISES IS RESIDENTIAL HOTEL, ALL AGREEMENTS ARE MADE ORALLY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SURESH PATEL DBA UNION HOTEL K. MIRANDA, PROP. MGR.

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCALLISTER, MACARTHUR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2030 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 - UNIT 39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
